items.name: VP Commercial
items.quote: We went from managing bids in Excel to full pipeline visibility in under two weeks. The commercial clarity alone was worth the engagement fee.

items.name: Managing Director
items.quote: From 22% to 38% bid conversion in one quarter. We finally know exactly why deals were stalling and what to do about it.

items.name: Sales Director
items.quote: We'd spent two years trying to break into the European defence supply chain. Venti Red got us in front of the right people and into the specification. The first contract followed the same year.
items.result: Into the Spec, Then the Contract
